prestazioni: Engine swap to a **mStallion 2.0L mHawk diesel (mE20)** with a **Garrett GT2260VK turbocharger** (hybrid compressor wheel, 0.64 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Bosch CRDI 2000 bar fuel system** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression ratio) for 220 HP and 500 Nm torque at 2,200 RPM

Full **ARB Old Man Emu BP-51 suspension kit** (remote-reservoir shocks, 3-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 50mm lift) with **Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 90D durometer)** for the front control arms and **Heavy-duty sway bars (Whiteline 24mm front, 22mm rear)**

Drivetrain reinforcement with **GKN VL3 viscous limited-slip differential (front and rear)** and **Ricardo 6-speed manual transmission (M6MF1) with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily/race twin-disc clutch** (2400 lb-ft torque capacity) and **PPG close-ratio gear set (2.66, 1.78, 1.30, 1.00, 0.74, 0.64)**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny RB-THAR widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, 3-piece overfenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom front splitter with integrated LED light bar mounts) finished in **PPG Matte Military Green (9334M) with **3M Scotchcal Matte Carbon Fiber vinyl overlays** on the hood and roof

**Hella Rallye 3000 Compact LED light pods** (50W CREE XHP50.2, 6000K) mounted on a **custom aluminum bumper (Fab Fours Vengeance series)** with **Warn Zeon 10-S winch (synthetic rope, 10,000 lb capacity)** and **PIAA LP570 fog lights**

**OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (17x9 +12 offset)** wrapped in **BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/70R17)** with **Brembo 4-piston calipers (front, 330mm rotors)** and **EBC Yellowstuff brake pads** paired with **Goodridge stainless steel braided brake lines**
